subcodes.title: Interview with Mrs. Jo Goudsmit at House of the Master in Haifa, 1920-02 ca.
subcodes.first_line: He answered me that his father had not really founded a new religion, but a Bahaiuistic Organization. This derives its name from the prophet Bahaula, his father. For six thousand years, he continued
